action.hypothesis: Keeping `lowrank_two_stage_residual` fixed and dropping only `K` from 4 to 2 will test whether this family remains Pareto-relevant in the extreme low-K regime, identifying where its low-support frontier breaks down.
action.summary: Continue the controlled same-family sweep with a parameter-only run at `K=2`, while pinning the established recipe (`ARCHITECTURE=lowrank_two_stage_residual`, `EXPANSION_FACTOR=12`, `OPTIMIZER=signum`, `LR=1.6e-3`, `AUXK_ALPHA=0.0`). The `K=4` result was still keep-worthy, so the next most informative move is to probe the next lower support level before changing architecture.
action.self_review: This keeps variable isolation intact, continues a productive low-K mapping run, and answers the most immediate frontier question before spending a round on a new family.
notes_to_memory: Round 6 extends the controlled `lowrank_two_stage_residual` K sweep from 4 to 2 with all other recipe fields pinned.
The family has remained keep-worthy at every lower-K step so far, so testing `K=2` is the highest-information continuation before branching to routed variants or new families.
next_hypotheses: If `K=2` stays competitive, continue to `K=1` on the same family to locate the endpoint of this architecture's low-K tail.
If `K=2` degrades sharply, shift back to the 16-24 regime and test a routed variant for better support allocation.
If `K=2` is borderline but promising, keep the family fixed and tune stage allocation rather than changing the broader recipe.

result.description: Continue the controlled same-family sweep with a parameter-only run at `K=2`, while pinning the established recipe (`ARCHITECTURE=lowrank_two_stage_residual`, `EXPANSION_FACTOR=12`, `OPTIMIZER=signum`, `LR=1.6e-3`, `AUXK_ALPHA=0.0`). The `K=4` result was still keep-worthy, so the next most informative move is to probe the next lower support level before changing architecture.
result.self_review: This keeps variable isolation intact, continues a productive low-K mapping run, and answers the most immediate frontier question before spending a round on a new family.
